title: Luigi the Musical
full_description: Luigi Mangione, accused of killing a health insurance CEO, shares a cell with Sam Bankman-Fried and Sean 'Diddy' Combs. What starts as chaos turns into a surreal plan for freedom and unexpected fame. A dark comedic musical that uses absurdist humour and original music to explore corporate greed, public spectacle, and the creation of viral folk heroes in the internet age.
ai_summary: A satirical viral musical — written in the wake of Luigi Mangione's arrest — imagines him sharing a cell with Sam Bankman-Fried and Diddy, the three of them plotting escape while the internet decides who deserves hero status. Dark, funny, and politically on the money.
